requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (KS CISPR 14 series under KEBS PVoC; radio matters via CA)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（KS CISPR 14系列，KEBS PVoC框架下；无线事项经CA）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（KS CISPR 14系列，KEBS PVoC框架下；無線事項經CA）

summary.en: Kenya does not operate a standalone EU-style EMC Directive. Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances is handled through the Kenyan adoption of the IEC/CISPR appliance standards — KS CISPR 14-1 (emission) and KS CISPR 14-2 (immunity) — applied as part of the product standard set verified under the mandatory KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme. There is no separate EMC self-declaration regime as in the EU; EMC conformity, where the regulated-product standard calls for it, is checked together with safety by the KEBS-appointed PVoC agent and is reflected in the per-consignment Certificate of Conformity (CoC). Separately, if a refrigerator incorporates radio functionality (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), type approval / acceptance from the Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) is required for the radio module, distinct from the KEBS product CoC. Plain-vanilla refrigerators without radio modules are governed by the appliance EMC standard only.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚不设独立的欧盟式EMC指令。家用器具的电磁兼容通过肯尼亚采用的IEC/CISPR器具标准处理——KS CISPR 14-1（发射）和KS CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）——作为强制性KEBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）计划核验的产品标准集的一部分适用。不存在欧盟那样独立的EMC自我声明制度；当受管制产品标准要求时，EMC合格性由KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构与安全一并核查，并体现在按批的符合性证书（CoC）中。另外，若电冰箱含无线功能（用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），其无线模块须取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）的型号核准/认可，独立于KEBS产品CoC。无无线模块的普通电冰箱仅受器具EMC标准管辖。
summary.zht: 肯亞不設獨立的歐盟式EMC指令。家用器具的電磁相容通過肯亞採用的IEC/CISPR器具標準處理——KS CISPR 14-1（發射）和KS CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）——作為強制性KEBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）計畫核驗的產品標準集的一部分適用。不存在歐盟那樣獨立的EMC自我聲明制度；當受管制產品標準要求時，EMC合格性由KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構與安全一併核查，並體現在按批的符合性證書（CoC）中。另外，若電冰箱含無線功能（用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），其無線模組須取得肯亞通信管理局（CA）的型號核准/認可，獨立於KEBS產品CoC。無無線模組的普通電冰箱僅受器具EMC標準管轄。

standards_or_laws: KS CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (Kenya adoption of CISPR 14-1)
KS CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (Kenya adoption of CISPR 14-2)
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — EMC checked within the regulated-product standard set, reflected in the consignment Certificate of Conformity (CoC)
Kenya Information and Communications Act + Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) type approval — applicable only where the appliance contains a radio module (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China (GB 4343.1) and Kenya (KS CISPR 14-1) derive from CISPR 14-1, the technical emission/immunity requirements are closely aligned — but conformity is established differently: China through CCC, Kenya through the KEBS-appointed PVoC agent per consignment.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），谐波发射方面适用GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国（GB 4343.1）与肯尼亚（KS CISPR 14-1）均源自CISPR 14-1，技术发射/抗扰度要求高度一致——但合格性确立方式不同：中国通过CCC，肯尼亚通过KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构按批进行。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015），諧波發射方面適用GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國（GB 4343.1）與肯亞（KS CISPR 14-1）均源自CISPR 14-1，技術發射/抗擾度要求高度一致——但合格性確立方式不同：中國通過CCC，肯亞通過KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構按批進行。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Honestly stated, Kenya has no separate horizontal EMC law equivalent to EU Directive 2014/30/EU — EMC for appliances lives inside the KS/CISPR product standards verified under PVoC, so there is no second self-declaration step to manage. The practical gaps are procedural rather than technical: (1) Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC EMC test data is not automatically accepted; the KEBS-appointed PVoC agent must be satisfied against KS CISPR 14-1/14-2, although CISPR-based IEC/CB test reports usually support this and can speed repeat clearances; (2) EMC is not separately certified or labelled in Kenya — it is folded into the consignment CoC, so exporters should confirm with their PVoC agent which standards in the regulated set are actually checked; (3) only if the refrigerator carries a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth radio does a genuinely new obligation arise — Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) type approval for the radio module — which has no counterpart in the appliance CoC and must be arranged separately.
gap.zh: 据实而言，肯尼亚没有等同于欧盟指令2014/30/EU的独立横向EMC法律——器具EMC置于PVoC核验的KS/CISPR产品标准内，故无需管理第二道自我声明步骤。实际差距属程序性而非技术性：（1）中国GB 4343.1 CCC电磁兼容检测数据不被自动接受；KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构须依据KS CISPR 14-1/14-2核实合格，但基于CISPR的IEC/CB检测报告通常可提供支持并加快重复清关；（2）肯尼亚不单独认证或标识EMC——其纳入按批CoC，故出口商应与PVoC代理机构确认受管制标准集中实际核查的标准；（3）仅当电冰箱带Wi-Fi/蓝牙无线时才产生真正新增义务——肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）对无线模块的型号核准——该义务在器具CoC中无对应，须单独办理。
gap.zht: 據實而言，肯亞沒有等同於歐盟指令2014/30/EU的獨立橫向EMC法律——器具EMC置於PVoC核驗的KS/CISPR產品標準內，故無需管理第二道自我聲明步驟。實際差距屬程序性而非技術性：（1）中國GB 4343.1 CCC電磁相容檢測數據不被自動接受；KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構須依據KS CISPR 14-1/14-2核實合格，但基於CISPR的IEC/CB檢測報告通常可提供支持並加快重複清關；（2）肯亞不單獨認證或標識EMC——其納入按批CoC，故出口商應與PVoC代理機構確認受管制標準集中實際核查的標準；（3）僅當電冰箱帶Wi-Fi/藍牙無線時才產生真正新增義務——肯亞通信管理局（CA）對無線模組的型號核准——該義務在器具CoC中無對應，須單獨辦理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the regulated-product standard requires it — appliance EMC (KS CISPR 14 series) is verified within the KEBS PVoC consignment CoC; CA radio type approval is mandatory only if a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth module is present. No standalone EU-style EMC self-declaration regime exists.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC); Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) for radio type approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya has no standalone EMC directive — appliance EMC is verified through KS CISPR 14-1/14-2 inside the mandatory KEBS PVoC consignment Certificate of Conformity. The technical basis is close to China's GB 4343.1 (both from CISPR 14-1), but Chinese CCC EMC data is not automatically accepted; IEC/CB reports usually support PVoC. A genuinely new step arises only for refrigerators with a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth radio, which require Communications Authority of Kenya type approval for the radio module.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚无独立EMC指令——器具EMC通过KS CISPR 14-1/14-2在强制性KEBS PVoC按批符合性证书内核验。技术基础与中国GB 4343.1接近（均源自CISPR 14-1），但中国CCC电磁兼容数据不被自动接受；IEC/CB报告通常可支持PVoC。真正新增的步骤仅针对带Wi-Fi/蓝牙无线的电冰箱，其无线模块须取得肯尼亚通信管理局型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞無獨立EMC指令——器具EMC通過KS CISPR 14-1/14-2在強制性KEBS PVoC按批符合性證書內核驗。技術基礎與中國GB 4343.1接近（均源自CISPR 14-1），但中國CCC電磁相容數據不被自動接受；IEC/CB報告通常可支持PVoC。真正新增的步驟僅針對帶Wi-Fi/藍牙無線的電冰箱，其無線模組須取得肯亞通信管理局型號核准。
